title: SARM Event
description: Event envelope per §7. SARM standardizes only the envelope structure; it does NOT define an event vocabulary. The 'type' field is a Source-System-determined string, declared via the capability exchange (§4.7).

id.description: Unique event identifier; the consumer's idempotency key per §7.3.

type.description: Event type: a Source-System-determined string. SARM defines no values. Conventional names (remediation.confirmed, scope.discovered) are illustrative only per §7.2.

occurredAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when the event occurred.

source.description: Identifies the emitting Source System. Used to apply the correct declared vocabulary when working with multiple Source Systems.

data.description: Event-specific payload. Structure is determined by the event type.
